page_metadata.biotools__summary: Online search tool to search for variations in all protein-coding gene sequences of 36 sequenced mouse inbred strains, compared to the reference strain C57BL 6J, which could be linked to strain-specific phenotypes and modifier effects.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Online search tool to search for variations in all protein-coding gene sequences of 36 sequenced mouse inbred strains, compared to the reference strain C57BL 6J, which could be linked to strain-specific phenotypes and modifier effects.
